sampleHooks: Most people run one AI agent… this runs 60.RuFlow plugs into Claude Code and handles research, coding, testing, all at once.

items.title:
Most people run one AI agent… this runs 60.RuFlow plugs into Claude Code and handles research, coding, testing, all at once.

Smart routing = cheaper + faster
Shared memory = better results over time But if your inputs are bad, output will still suck.

DM “flow” and I’ll send you the setup link.

#aitools #claudecode #aiagents #automation #tiktoktech
